document_metadata.title: Putting MEPs in their political armies
document_metadata.first_words: # MEPs and political groupings in the European Parliament The European Parliament has political groupings each made up of at least 25 MEPs from across at least seven nations. In a Politics Europe film, Adam Fleming enlisted the help of models at the parliament to look at how the MEPs line up in their own political armies for the sittings in Brussels and Strasbourg. He explains where the British MEPs sit in the groups - whose names and acronyms are largely unknown in the UK. More from the Daily and Sunday Politics: Watch full programmes from the last seven days via BBC iPlayer; 'like' us on Facebook, external page or 'follow' us on Twitter, external

class="ssrcss-f6h2dj-InlineLink e1kn3p7n0">Politics Europe</a> film, Adam Fleming enlisted the help of models at the parliament to look at how the MEPs line up in their own political armies for the sittings in Brussels and Strasbourg.</p><p class="ssrcss-1q0x1qg-Paragraph e1jhz7w10">He explains where the British MEPs sit in the groups - whose names and acronyms are largely unknown in the # MEPs and political groupings in the European Parliament

## To play this video you need to enable JavaScript in your browser.

This video can not be played

MEPs and political groupings in the European ParliamentClose

The European Parliament has political groupings each made up of at least 25 MEPs from across at least seven nations.

In a [Politics Europe](/programmes/b01mtnhg) film, Adam Fleming enlisted the help of models at the parliament to look at how the MEPs line up in their own political armies for the sittings in Brussels and Strasbourg.

He explains where the British MEPs sit in the groups - whose names and acronyms are largely unknown in the UK.

***More from the Daily and Sunday Politics:*** *Watch full programmes from the last seven days via* [BBC iPlayer](/programmes/p00ly0k7/episodes/player)*; 'like' us on* [Facebook, external](http://www.facebook.com/bbcdailyandsundaypolitics) *page or 'follow' us on* [Twitter, external](http://twitter.com/daily_politics)

# MEPs and political groupings in the European Parliament

## To play this video you need to enable JavaScript in your browser.

This video can not be played

MEPs and political groupings in the European ParliamentClose

The European Parliament has political groupings each made up of at least 25 MEPs from across at least seven nations.

In a [Politics Europe](/programmes/b01mtnhg) film, Adam Fleming enlisted the help of models at the parliament to look at how the MEPs line up in their own political armies for the sittings in Brussels and Strasbourg.

He explains where the British MEPs sit in the groups - whose names and acronyms are largely unknown in the UK.

***More from the Daily and Sunday Politics:*** *Watch full programmes from the last seven days via* [BBC iPlayer](/programmes/p00ly0k7/episodes/player)*; 'like' us on* [Facebook, external](http://www.facebook.com/bbcdailyandsundaypolitics) *page or 'follow' us on* [Twitter, external](http://twitter.com/daily_politics)
